input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.2.1
            TITLE: for ic vehicles:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.2.1: For IC vehicles:
D.13.2.1 For IC vehicles: 
a. The fuel tank must be filled to the fuel level line (IC.5.4.5)  
b. During fuelling, once filled to the scribe line, no shaking or tilting of the tank, fuel system, 
or the entire vehicle is allowed.

final_answer: rule D.13.2.1: For IC vehicles: D.13.2.1 For IC vehicles: a. The fuel tank must be filled to the fuel level line (IC.5.4.5) b. During fuelling, once filled to the scribe line, no shaking or tilting of the tank, fuel system, or the entire vehicle is allowed.
